item.title: Frontier Exploration - Learning Progression and Curriculum Design
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Learning Progression and Curriculum Design How do you capture the implicit ordering of knowledge in a domain? When building a knowledge base for learning purposes, how do you determine what to learn first, second, and why? The Problem When bootstrapping a knowledge base in a n...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - AI Model Version Dependencies in Knowledge Bases
item.description: Frontier Exploration - AI Model Version Dependencies in Knowledge Bases How to handle knowledge that depends on specific AI models or versions — and what happens when models change.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: Active Reading
item.description: Active Reading Active reading means engaging deeply with knowledge base content rather than passively consuming it. The Three Pillars 1.

item.title: Anti-Pattern - Note Hoarding
item.description: Anti-Pattern: Note Hoarding Saving everything without processing undermines a second brain’s effectiveness — but so does capturing information with no long-term value.

item.title: Anti-Patterns in Knowledge Management
item.description: Anti-Patterns in Knowledge Management Common mistakes that undermine a second brain’s effectiveness.

item.title: Atomic Note Principle
item.description: Atomic Note Principle A note must be atomic — it contains exactly one single idea.

item.title: Claude Knowledge Base Setup
item.description: Claude Knowledge Base Setup How to bootstrap an AI-friendly knowledge base for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and other AI agents.

item.title: Domain Gap - Music Composition Knowledge Capture
item.description: Domain Gap: Music Composition Knowledge Capture The Challenge An AI building a music composition knowledge base using only current Seed rules would encounter situations where the rules are insufficient or silent.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - AI-Generated Content Verification
item.description: Frontier Exploration - AI-Generated Content Verification The Gap The Seed covers: Source citation requirements Confidence markers Procedural knowledge verification AI-optimized knowledge structures But there’s no explicit guidance on: How to verify that content generated by AI assistants is accurate...
